nodes.name: 叢林麻雀
nodes.summary: 叢林麻雀（Sind sparrow，学名 Passer pyrrhonotus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地。
nodes.shortSummary: 叢林麻雀（學名：Passer pyrrhonotus），又稱信德麻雀，為雀形目麻雀科麻雀屬物種，分布于南亞印度河周圍的山谷地區。该种與家麻雀非常相似，但体型更小，且羽毛具有獨特的特徵。其雄鳥的羽毛比雌鳥和幼鳥更为明亮，同時具有黑色斑紋和灰色冠羽。與家麻雀不同的是，雄性叢林麻雀在…

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Within its Indus valley breeding range in Pakistan and western India, the Sind sparrow is patchily distributed in riverine and wetland habitats with thorny scrub and tall grass

links.key: bird-叢林麻雀-4fc3080c__distributed_in__loc-阿拉伯联合酋长国-70675864
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: N.|year=1992|title=Sind Jungle Sparrow Passer pyrrhonotus Blyth in North-West Gujarat|journal=Journal of the Bombay Natural History Society|volume=89|issue=3|page=378|url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/48732858|access-date=19 February 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170904111143/http://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/48732858|archive-date=4 September 2017|url-status=live}} Longer movements may occur, as suggested by a possible sighting in the United Arab Emirates in November 2000. It mostly breeds in acacia and tamarisk scrub and tall grass, invariably near rivers or other wetlands. The construction and expansion of irrigation canals has increased its habitat in Sindh, and helped it extend its range into the Yamuna floodplain and parts of Rajasthan, India.{{cite journal|last1=Harvey|first1=B|last2=Sharma|first2=S
